Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Pest Control to get the job done right.

“After finding termite damage in our 1930s Seminole Heights bungalow, Summit identified issues we'd missed for years. Their technician spotted telltale mud tubes behind our original baseboards and recommended targeted treatment that saved our historic wood floors. Two years later, still termite-free!”

Sarah J. Termite Inspection
Mar 15, 2025

“Living near Bayshore, we battled rats every winter. Summit sealed every possible entry point in our 1970s ranch, including clever solutions for our older garage. They even found where rodents were climbing palm trees to access our roof. Haven't seen a single rodent since their work last fall.”

Marcus T. Rodent Exclusion
Jan 22, 2025

“Our backyard near the Hillsborough River was unusable evenings due to mosquitoes. Summit installed a misting system that blends perfectly with our landscaping. Now we actually enjoy our pool area at sunset - worth every penny in mosquito-heavy Tampa summers.”

Elena R. Mosquito Misting System
Apr 5, 2025

“Discovered bed bugs after hosting international relatives. Summit's heat treatment solved our problem in one day with minimal prep work. Their technician explained exactly how to prevent reinfestation - crucial since we live in a downtown high-rise with lots of traveler traffic.”

David L. Bed Bug Treatment
Feb 18, 2025

“Our new construction home in Westchase had palmetto bugs within months. Summit identified they were coming through our AC chase and treated without making our baby's nursery off-limits. Their quarterly maintenance keeps them completely away - even during rainy season.”

Natalie K. Palmetto Bug Control
May 30, 2025

“As a snowbird, I needed someone to protect my Clearwater condo while I'm away. Summit set up annual inspections and preventative treatment that's already caught early termite activity. Their detailed reports give me peace of mind 1,500 miles away.”

Carlos M. Termite Treatment
Mar 1, 2025
Summit Pest Control

Trusted pest control professionals serving Tampa, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
